message:
fix: improve sidebar UX — increase spacing between drag handle and collapse arrow (#3642) (#3655)

Move the nav item action buttons (drag handle, remove) further from the
sidebar edge to prevent accidental clicks on the collapse arrow. Add a
proper hover highlight and larger click target to the grip/drag handle
icon for better discoverability. Nudge the collapse/pin controls
outward so they no longer overlap with item actions.

Closes #3642

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
